name: Basted Duck with Oyster Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the duck cavity with salt and pepper.
2. Add chopped, drained oysters to the bread stuffing mix. Use oyster liquid as part of the moisture for the stuffing.
3. Stuff the duck lightly.
4. Place any remaining stuffing in a separate pan to bake with the duck.
5. Mix together butter, lemon juice, paprika, and thyme.
6. Bake the duck on a rack in a covered roaster at 325°F oven for about 2 1/2 hours. Baste often with the lemon mixture.
7. Baste the dressing with duck drippings.
8. Remove the cover at the last to brown the duck.
